title: Solutions Catalog
description: Successful and transitioned DIU prototype solutions for immediate Department of Defense and Whole-of-Government purchase
text:
The objective of Production Umbrella Agreement #FA9302-24-9-9000 is for the Construction of 52 Electric Vehicle Make Ready Infrastructure at 51-52 Sites at Edwards Air Force Base, California where the capabilities include Battery Energy Storage Solutions for Resilience and/or Charging as a Service, which DIU categorized as "Service Base Charging" to separate this solution from unintended consequences associated with jargon .
The key elements acquired in production are laid out more fully in the Umbrella Agreement together with the Project Level Task Orders based on:
ALIN0001 - Design and Load Studies All Sites for 51 Sites
ALIN0002 - Construction
ALIN0003 - Travel
